info.title: Snap Marketing API
info.description: The Snap Marketing API (Ads API) enables programmatic management of advertising on Snapchat. Manage organizations, ad accounts, campaigns, ad squads, ads, creatives, media, audiences, funding sources, and access campaign statistics.

get.description: Retrieves a specific Organization by ID.
Retrieves all Ad Accounts for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Ad Account by ID.
Retrieves all Campaigns for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Campaign by ID.
Retrieves all Ad Squads for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Ad Squad by ID.
Retrieves all Ads for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Ad by ID.
Retrieves all Creatives for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Creative by ID.
Retrieves all Medias for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Media by ID.
Retrieves all Funding Sources for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Funding Source by ID.
Retrieves all Audience Segments for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Audience Segment by ID.
Retrieves all Targetings for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Targeting by ID.
Retrieves all Pixels for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Pixel by ID.
Retrieves all Catalogs for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Catalog by ID.
Retrieves all Product Sets for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Product Set by ID.
Retrieves all Product Items for the specified parent resource.
Retrieves a specific Product Item by ID.
Retrieves performance statistics for an ad account.
Retrieves performance statistics for a campaign.
Retrieves performance statistics for an ad squad.
Retrieves performance statistics for an ad.

post.description: Adds users to a custom audience segment.

delete.description: Removes users from a custom audience segment.

get.description: Retrieves delivery status for entities in an ad account.

post.description: Uploads media content (image or video) in chunks.
Creates a lookalike audience segment based on an existing segment.
